title: The Role of the Author in AI Ethics and Public Policy
description: This flowchart illustrates the responsibilities, influences, and accountability of the 'Author' (creator/developer) within the lifecycle of an AI system and its interaction with public policy.
relationships: Authors design and develop the AI System based on Ethical Principles and Technical Goals
The deployed AI System interacts with and affects Stakeholders
Stakeholder feedback and Societal Impact inform Public Policy created by Governing Bodies
Governing Bodies establish Regulations and Guidelines that constrain and guide the Author
